title: ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH WOODBURN ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Adult Behavioral Health (ABH) provides outpatient treatment services. 976 N Pacific Highway Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Adults diagnosed with a serious and persistent mental illness and who experience functional impairments (i.e., history of inpatient psychiatric hospitalization, history of civil commitment, history of residential care, etc). Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 981-5351 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 981-5351 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CRISIS CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH & FAMILY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH WOODBURN
